title: Use a Rideshare Pickup
summary: Request a rideshare trip and meet the driver at the correct pickup location.
learnerPromise: You will be able to request a rideshare trip, confirm your pickup spot, identify the correct vehicle, and communicate with the driver if needed.
whyItMatters: Rideshare apps are a common way to get around when transit is not available. Knowing how to use one safely helps you travel independently and avoid confusion at pickup time.
realLifeUses: Getting a ride home from a location with limited bus or train service
Using a rideshare to reach an appointment on time when running late
Sharing a ride with friends to an event and splitting the fare
Getting a ride to the airport early in the morning
materialsNeeded: A smartphone with a rideshare app installed
A payment method linked to the app
result: You complete a rideshare pickup by matching the vehicle and driver details and confirming the ride.
youWillLearn: How to enter a destination and request a ride in the app
How to set a clear and safe pickup location
How to verify the driver, car, and license plate before getting in
How to communicate with the driver if your location is hard to find
miniChallenge: Open a rideshare app, enter a nearby destination, and review the pickup process without confirming the ride. Note the driver verification details you would check before entering a vehicle.
steps: Open the rideshare app and type in your destination.
Review the pickup spot on the map and move the pin if needed to a safe, accurate location.
Request the ride and wait in a visible, safe spot.
When the driver arrives, check the license plate, car color, and driver photo against the app.
Confirm the driver knows your name before getting in, then sit in the back seat.
completionCriteria: You entered a destination and reviewed the pickup location
You identified what details to verify before entering the car
You described the safety steps you would follow
commonProblems: The driver may go to the wrong side of a large building or complex
Surge pricing can make the fare much higher than expected
It may be hard to find the right car in busy pickup areas like airports
tips: Stand in a visible spot and wave when you see the car approaching
Double-check the license plate before opening the door
Share your trip status with a trusted friend or family member when possible
